page.title: Template:Country data Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan (1996–2001)

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan (1996–2001)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan (1996–2001)]]</includeonly>

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan (1996–2001) | shortname alias = Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan | flag alias = Flag of the Taliban.svg | flag alias-1996 = Flag of Taliban (original).svg | flag alias-1997 = Flag of the Taliban.svg | flag alias-1997a = Flag of the Taliban (Variant).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1996 | var2 = 1997 | var3 = 1997a | related1 = Afghanistan | related2 = Emirate of Afghanistan | related3 = Kingdom of Afghanistan | related4 = Emirate of Afghanistan (1929) | related5 = Republic of Afghanistan (1973–1978) | related6 = Democratic Republic of Afghanistan | related7 = Republic of Afghanistan (1987–1992) | related8 = Islamic State of Afghanistan | related9 = Transitional Islamic State of Afghanistan | related10 = Islamic Republic of Afghanistan | related11 = Taliban | cat = Afghanistan, Islamic Emirate (1996–2001) </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
